name: DSAR Precedent Finder for evidence
description: DSAR Precedent Finder for evidence routes case law and classifies filings; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via eBilling to accelerate filing.

steps.name: Request Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize emails from Records; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Delegate
steps.description: Execute delegate phase for the Multi-Agent pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Handoff
steps.description: Execute handoff phase for the Multi-Agent pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Entity Extraction
steps.description: Entity Extraction across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Policy Check
steps.description: Policy Check across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Review Routing
steps.description: Review Routing across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Classification
steps.description: Classification across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Ingestion
steps.description: Ingestion across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Privilege Log
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to DMS; return response JSON for the client.
